s: Offline currency converter with favorites, charts, and widget
d:
Offline Currency Converter is a privacy-focused currency converter that works completely offline. No account, no tracking, no analytics — just exchange rates in your pocket.

Sync rates from the free Frankfurter API (European Central Bank) and convert 160+ currencies entirely offline. Configure sync intervals (6h, 12h, 24h, 48h, weekly, or manual only) and let WorkManager handle background updates.

Features:
  • Favorites — star your most-used currencies for quick access
  • Multi-currency view — see conversions to all your favorites at once
  • Rate trend charts — 90-day interactive charts with touch tooltips and date range tabs
  • Home screen widget — Material You dynamic colors, works with any currency pair
  • Sync status — colored badge shows how fresh your rates are
  • 160+ currencies — all ECB reference rates
  • Offline-first — all conversions happen on device
  • Privacy first — no accounts, no tracking, no network permissions at runtime
  • Material Design 3 — modern UI with dynamic theming
  • 13 languages — ar, de, es, fr, hi, it, ja, ko, nl, pl, pt, ru, zh
Free and open source (AGPLv3).
